other_observers: Jeannie Mitchell, Cici Lee, Steve Mlodinow, Nick Moore the first day.
specific_location: Rose Pond at Chico Basin Ranch
description: I was at Rose Pond at Chico Basin Ranch, after leaving the Headquarters (where there was a male Cape May Warbler), and quickly saw a male Cape May Warbler. Then later east along the dam, there was a male Cape May Warbler there as well. I'm not sure how many of these birds were around. I assume the bird from the Headquarters wasn't the bird at Rose Pond. See photos of the bird at Rose Pond, which stayed for three days.Behavior: In trees, moving around the leaves eating food.Call: nonePlumage: adult breeding plumage
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival photo from day one, Brandon K Percival photo from day one, Brandon K Percival photo from day one, Brandon K Percival photo from day two, Brandon K Percival photo from day three
